short_description: Upgrade website hosting plan for increased storage
description: Current hosting plan at 5 GB storage; expanding to 20 GB to support media files and document uploads.

short_description: Renew SSL certificate for shilohbaptistbiloxi.org
description: SSL certificate expires June 22, 2026. Renew and install new certificate before expiration.

short_description: Migrate church website to new WordPress theme
description: Current theme is outdated and not mobile-responsive. Migrating to a modern mobile-first theme.

short_description: Install new online giving plugin with recurring support
description: Replace current donation plugin with one supporting recurring weekly/monthly giving and automated receipts.

short_description: Emergency SMTP relay reconfiguration
description: Reconfigure SMTP relay credentials after hosting provider changed mail server settings during maintenance.

short_description: Add building committee private document portal
description: Create a password-protected section of the website for the building committee to upload and share documents.

short_description: Set up church-wide email newsletter platform
description: Integrate Mailchimp with the church website to replace current unreliable newsletter plugin.

short_description: Install outdoor Wi-Fi access point for parking lot services
description: Pastor Wilkins requests outdoor Wi-Fi to support overflow congregation and outdoor events.

short_description: Upgrade office computers to Windows 11
description: Two office computers still running Windows 10; scheduled upgrade to Windows 11 before end of support.

short_description: Replace fellowship hall projector lamp
description: Projector lamp exceeding 3000 hours of use; replacement due before fall programming season.

short_description: Configure automated website backup to cloud storage
description: Set up daily automated backups of website and database to secure cloud storage.

short_description: Deploy two-factor authentication on church admin accounts
description: Enable 2FA for all WordPress admin accounts to improve security after brute-force attempt detected.

short_description: Increase building committee portal file upload limit
description: Raise file upload size limit from 5 MB to 25 MB for the building committee document portal.

short_description: Add live sermon streaming capability to website
description: Integrate YouTube Live embed on the website to stream Sunday services for homebound members.

short_description: Create member portal login for congregation
description: Build a self-service member portal where congregation can update their own contact info and view giving history.

short_description: Update church website copyright year and content
description: Several pages still reference 2025 in copyright footers and dated ministry descriptions.

short_description: Configure prayer request form email notifications
description: Repair and reconfigure the prayer request form to deliver submissions to Pastor Wilkins and the prayer team.

short_description: Optimize church website images for mobile performance
description: Compress and resize all full-resolution images on the website to improve mobile load times.

short_description: Set up church social media auto-post from website events
description: Connect church website event calendar to automatically post upcoming events to Facebook.

short_description: Add building fund donation progress bar to website
description: Display a real-time building fund progress tracker on the giving page showing total raised vs goal.
